label.description: Short label describing the metric, e.g. "Monthly Revenue".

value.description: The statistic. Strings rendered verbatim; numbers formatted via formatNumber.

change.description: Optional change indicator with direction and accessible wording.

valueFormatOptions.description: Intl.NumberFormat options applied only when `value` is a number.

valueLocale.description: Locale forwarded to formatNumber (defaults to en-US).
